zh.Towton Battlefield, Saxton, West Yorkshi: 英國英格蘭越可爾薩克斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Heron於大約1450年出生在英國諾圖波藍德福特時，她的父親Sir John Heron of Ford Castle34歲，母親Elizabeth Heron29歲。她於1467年之前與Sir Robert Tailboys結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1495年1月30日之前，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾吉。

zh-hans.Towton Battlefield, Saxton, West Yorkshi: 英国英格兰越可爾薩克斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Heron于大约1450年出生在英国諾圖波藍德福特时，她的父亲Sir John Heron of Ford Castle34岁，母亲Elizabeth Heron29岁。她于1467年之前与Sir Robert Tailboys结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1495年1月30日之前，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾吉。

nameMeanings.name: Heron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Heron was born about 1450, in Ford, Northumberland, England, her father, Sir John Heron of Ford Castle, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth Heron, was 29. She married Sir Robert Tailboys before 1467. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 30 January 1495, and was buried in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Heron est née environ 1450, à Ford, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Heron of Ford Castle, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Heron, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Tailboys avant 1467. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 30 janvier 1495, et a été enterrée à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Heron um 1450 in Ford, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Heron of Ford Castle 34 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Heron 29. Sie hat vor 1467 Sir Robert Tailboys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 30. Januar 1495 und wurde in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Heron è nata il circa 1450 nel Ford, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Sir John Heron of Ford Castle, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Heron, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Tailboys prima del 1467. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 30 gennaio 1495, e fu sepolta a Kyme, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Heronが約1450年にイギリスノースウンバーランドフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John Heron of Ford Castleは34歳，母Elizabeth Heronは29歳であった。1467年以前にSir Robert Tailboysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1495年1月30日以前に死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Heron(이)가 대략 1450년 영국 노르스벌랜드 포드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Heron of Ford Castle(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Heron(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1467년 이전 Sir Robert Tailboys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 1월 30일 이전 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Heron nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Heron of Ford Castle, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Heron, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Tailboys antes 1467. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 30 de janeiro de 1495, e foi sepultada em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Heron родилась около 1450 г. в местности форд, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Heron of Ford Castle было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Heron, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Tailboys перед 1467 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 30 январь 1495 г. и была похоронена в местности ким, линколншир, Англия.

sm.about 1450–before 30 January 1495: e tusa o le 1450–a'e le'I oo le 30 Ianuari 1495

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Heron nació aproximadamente 1450, en Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Heron of Ford Castle, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Heron, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Tailboys antes de 1467. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 30 de enero de 1495, y fue sepultada en Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
